prompt: I need to refactor the UserService to use the repository pattern instead of direct database calls. It's a focused change across 3 files in src/users/. Can you spec it out and implement it?

assertions.description: Routes to Quick Flow based on the description of a small, focused change
Starts at Quick Flow Step 1 (Create Tech-Spec) since no spec exists
Spawns quick-spec-creator sub-agent using bmad-quick-spec skill
Includes the user's change description in the sub-agent prompt
